name: twitter-clon
description: Clon de X (Twitter) — React, Tailwind, Supabase (solo vía api/)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:app && npm run install:api
scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:app" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.supabase:gen: cd api && ( [ -z "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID" ] && echo 'Configura SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID' && exit 1; npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID" > src/types/supabase.ts )
